rawText: Coastal frame restaurant at 789 Beach Blvd, Miami FL 33139. Two-story wood frame construction built 1969. Total insured value: $3,200,000. No sprinklers. Local fire alarm only. Roof 22 years old showing wear. Full-service restaurant with commercial kitchen, grease fryers. Located in FEMA Zone AE flood area, near hurricane coast.
notes: High-risk: old frame construction + restaurant + coastal flood + hurricane exposure
